notes: Wave 12 Track A candidate, from country-hub-data.js gap scan. Uses the exact proven pattern of the live ascension-day-germany event (type: easter, easterOffset: 39).

Owner explicitly confirmed 2026-07-14 (AskUserQuestion) to proceed with Easter-cycle events, framed strictly around legal/civil/historical status, matching the existing live good-friday-germany/ascension-day-germany/assumption-day-france pattern.

Date rule (always a Thursday, 39 days after Easter Sunday) and history (religious origin 4th century; French legal holiday since the 1801 Concordat) confirmed via WebSearch against sortiraparis.com/animapro.fr/elementeyre.fr.

Competitor check: sortiraparis.com's Arabic translations and wissal.org cover practical shopping/pool-hours content only, radar2.net is seasonal transport/weather news, none explain the 'pont de l'Ascension' (4-day weekend from 1 vacation day) tradition or the Thursday-every-year calculation in Arabic.

Differentiator: 'pont de l'Ascension' is the single most distinctive French cultural/practical angle for this holiday (versus Germany's Vatertag) and is completely unaddressed by any Arabic competitor found.
